hypertrophy.reasoning: Address posterior chain imbalances and upper back endurance to support bench pressing without compounding lower body fatigue.

siri_text: Wednesday's workout. Strength: Deadlift, 4 by 6 at 65 percent. Strength: Bench Press, 4 by 6 at 65 percent. Metcon: EMOM: 5 thrusters @ 50/35kg, 8 Bar facing burpees. For hypertrophy, focus on back, rear delts, biceps.
